Pico ROM Reader V1.0

Press any key to enter setup...
  0...  1...  2...  3...  4...
Setting GPIOs...
Slot Dump

Writing data to slot 39
Data written
Done.

Pico ROM Reader V1.0

Press any key to enter setup...
  0...  1...  2...  3...  4...
Setting GPIOs...
Slot Dump
